summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Professional Fashion Expert feature. All major functionality working correctly including experts directory, ads manager, professional profile settings, and navigation integration.

integration_issues.issue: Hebrew and Arabic language switching via URL parameter (?lng=he, ?lng=ar) not working - content remains in English

passed_tests: TopNav 'My ads' menu item visible for professional users
Experts directory loads and displays professional cards correctly
Expert card shows name, profession, business details, and contact buttons
Experts directory filter inputs present and functional
AdTicker appears on experts page footer with regional ads
Ads Manager accessible for professional users
New campaign creation modal opens with all required fields
Campaign form accepts input for name, profession, headline, body, budget, targeting
Campaign saving works and shows success message
Campaign listing displays existing campaigns with metrics
Stylist page 'Ask a Professional' button enabled and functional
Ask a Professional button correctly navigates to /experts page
Professional user properly listed in experts directory (1 expert found)
Expert count badge shows correct number
Professional card contact buttons (website, call, email) present
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix i18n language switching functionality - Hebrew and Arabic translations are present in locale files but URL parameter switching (?lng=he, ?lng=ar) is not working to change the interface language
